title: SLO Enforcement Decision
description: Governed runtime enforcement decision artifact produced by the TI Enforcement Layer (Prompt 11B). Evaluates traceability_integrity_sli against a named policy profile and determines whether a pipeline stage may proceed, must warn, or must fail.

artifact_id.description: Identifier of the artifact being evaluated by this enforcement decision.

enforcement_policy.description: Named policy profile used to derive this decision.

enforcement_scope.description: Optional pipeline stage identifier for which this enforcement was invoked.

decision_status.description: Enforcement outcome. 'allow' means proceed; 'allow_with_warning' means proceed with caution; 'fail' means stop.

decision_reason_code.description: Machine-readable code identifying the primary reason for this enforcement decision.

traceability_integrity_sli.description: The traceability_integrity SLI value that was evaluated. Null when the value was absent or could not be parsed.

lineage_validation_mode.description: Lineage validation mode recorded in the evaluated artifact ('strict' or 'degraded'). '(unknown)' when absent.

lineage_defaulted.description: True when lineage fields were populated via fail-safe defaults rather than validated registry resolution. Null when the state could not be determined from the input artifact.

lineage_valid.description: Whether the artifact lineage was validated without errors. Null when not determinable.

recommended_action.description: Machine-readable recommended action derived from the enforcement outcome.

warnings.description: Human-readable warning messages produced during enforcement evaluation.

errors.description: Human-readable error messages produced during enforcement evaluation (e.g. input validation failures).

evaluated_at.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this enforcement decision was generated.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for this enforcement decision.
